title: Replace all broken product images with AI-generated illustrations across all product sections

requirements.summary: Replace broken product images in KitchenUtensils.tsx with generated assets for all 5 product cards
acceptanceCriteria: All 5 product cards in the Kitchen Utensils section display a visible, correctly loaded image
Image paths correctly resolve to frontend/public/assets/generated/ filenames
No broken image icons appear in the Kitchen Utensils section

file_operations.description: Replace all broken product image src attributes with the correct paths to generated assets: milton-insignia-casserole.dim_600x600.png for Milton Insignia Casserole, crystal-wooden-serving-tray.dim_600x600.png for Crystal Wooden Serving Trays, milton-pearl-thermoware-casserole.dim_600x600.png for Milton Pearl Thermoware Insulated Casserole, senso-finger-chipser.dim_600x600.png for Senso Finger Chipser, and cello-puro-kids-water-bottles.dim_600x600.png for Cello Puro Kids & Junior Water Bottles. Use relative paths starting with /assets/generated/ to reference the static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated/.

requirements.summary: Replace broken dustbin image in HouseholdProducts.tsx with generated asset
acceptanceCriteria: The Household Products section displays a visible, correctly loaded dustbin image
No broken image icon appears in the Household Products section

file_operations.description: Replace the broken dustbin product image src attribute with the correct path to the generated asset frontend/public/assets/generated/colorful-plastic-dustbins.dim_600x600.png. Use the relative path /assets/generated/colorful-plastic-dustbins.dim_600x600.png in the img element.

requirements.summary: Replace broken category images in ProductCategories.tsx with generated assets for all 6 categories
acceptanceCriteria: All 6 product category cards display a visible, relevant image
No broken image icons appear in the Product Categories section
Image paths resolve correctly to frontend/public/assets/generated/

file_operations.description: Replace all broken category image src attributes with the correct paths to generated assets: category-stainless-steel-utensils.dim_600x400.png for Stainless Steel Utensils, category-pressure-cookers.dim_600x400.png for Pressure Cookers, category-cookware-sets.dim_600x400.png for Cookware Sets, category-kitchen-tools.dim_600x400.png for Kitchen Tools, category-plastic-household.dim_600x400.png for Plastic Household Items, and category-gift-items.dim_600x400.png for Gift Items. Use relative paths starting with /assets/generated/ to reference the static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated/.

requirements.summary: Replace broken featured product images with generated assets for all 8 products in the showcase section
acceptanceCriteria: All 8 featured product cards display a visible, relevant image
No broken image icons appear in the Featured Products section
Image paths resolve correctly to frontend/public/assets/generated/

file_operations.description: Identify the Featured Products Showcase section component (if it exists as a separate component imported into App.tsx). If the featured products are rendered inline or through an existing component, note the component name for the next file operation.

Replace all broken featured product image src attributes with the correct paths to generated assets: product-steel-tiffin-box.dim_600x600.png for Steel Tiffin Box, product-pressure-cooker-5l.dim_600x600.png for Pressure Cooker 5L, product-non-stick-kadai.dim_600x600.png for Non-Stick Kadai, product-steel-glass-set.dim_600x600.png for Steel Glass Set, product-casserole-set.dim_600x600.png for Casserole Set, product-mixing-bowls-set.dim_600x600.png for Mixing Bowls Set, product-vegetable-chopper.dim_600x600.png for Vegetable Chopper, and product-stainless-steel-thali.dim_600x600.png for Stainless Steel Thali. Use relative paths starting with /assets/generated/ to reference the static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated/. If this component does not exist and the featured products are part of KitchenUtensils or another existing component, merge this operation with the relevant component's existing file operation instead.

requirements.summary: Replace broken gallery images with generated assets for all 6 gallery grid items in the Photo Gallery section
acceptanceCriteria: All 6 gallery images are visible and load correctly
No broken image icons appear in the Photo Gallery section
Image paths resolve correctly to frontend/public/assets/generated/

file_operations.description: Identify the Photo Gallery section component (if it exists as a separate component imported into App.tsx). If the gallery is rendered inline or through an existing component, note the component name for the next file operation.

Replace all broken gallery image src attributes with the correct paths to generated assets: gallery-store-shelf.dim_800x600.png for gallery image 1, gallery-pressure-cookers.dim_800x600.png for gallery image 2, gallery-kitchen-tools.dim_800x600.png for gallery image 3, gallery-gift-hamper.dim_800x600.png for gallery image 4, gallery-casseroles.dim_800x600.png for gallery image 5, and gallery-household-products.dim_800x600.png for gallery image 6. Use relative paths starting with /assets/generated/ to reference the static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated/. If this component does not exist and the gallery is part of another existing component, merge this operation with the relevant component's existing file operation instead.

requirements.summary: Replace broken hero product image in HeroSection.tsx with generated hero asset
acceptanceCriteria: The hero section displays a visible, correctly loaded product image
No broken image icon appears in the hero section
Image path resolves correctly to frontend/public/assets/generated/

file_operations.description: Replace the broken hero product image src attribute with the correct path to the generated asset frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-utensils.dim_1200x600.png. Use the relative path /assets/generated/hero-utensils.dim_1200x600.png in the img element for the hero showcase card on the right side of the split layout.
